title: Amount of Time for Binary Tree to Be Infected
titleCn: 感染二叉树需要的总时间

testcases.input: root = [1,5,3,null,4,10,6,9,2], start = 3 Output: 4 Explanation: The following nodes are infected during: - Minute 0: Node 3 - Minute 1: Nodes 1, 10 and 6 - Minute 2: Node 5 - Minute 3: Node 4 - Minute 4: Nodes 9 and 2 It takes 4 minutes for the whole tree to be infected so we return 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: The following nodes are infected during: - Minute 0: Node 3 - Minute 1: Nodes 1, 10 and 6 - Minute 2: Node 5 - Minute 3: Node 4 - Minute 4: Nodes 9 and 2 It takes 4 minutes for the whole tree to be infected so we return 4.

testcases.input: root = [1], start = 1 Output: 0 Explanation: At minute 0, the only node in the tree is infected so we return 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: At minute 0, the only node in the tree is infected so we return 0.
